title: PG Ops Coordinator: Owner requested immediate setup. Execute GitHub upload now for private repo http
prompt:
Owner requested immediate setup. Execute GitHub upload now for private repo https://github.com/XposeMarket/Prometheus with STRICT scope control.

Mission:
1) Use only website files from team workspace (framework Next.js artifact set) and do NOT include any non-website Prometheus runtime/team files.
2) Push to repo in a clean commit.

Exact requirements:
- Source website directory: teams/team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45/workspace/website-week1-nextjs/
- Allowed additional docs (optional): teams/team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45/workspace/website-week1-implementation-checklist.md, website-week1-page-structure.md, website-week1-component-map.md, website-week1-section-copy-blocks.md
- In target GitHub repo, only add website-relevant content. Preferred layout:
  - website/  (contains Next.js app)
  - website/docs/ (contains allowed website markdown docs only)
- Explicitly exclude all other team artifacts (X queue, KPI tracker, execution handoff, product intel docs, etc.)

Execution steps:
- Clone/fetch target repo.
- Create/update only the allowed directories/files above.
- Run git status and provide file list that will be committed.
- Commit message: feat: add week-1 prometheus website scaffold and docs
- Push to default branch (or provide branch+PR URL if branch protection requires).

Deliver back:
- Repo branch and commit hash
- Exact committed file list
- Confirmation that excluded files were not committed
- Any blocker with exact error text

If credentials/permissions block push, report exact blocker and propose fastest fix path.
